gold.name: Adapt 2.0 Medium
gold.highlight: Molds to you for deep pressure relief

reasons.default: Memory foam that molds to your body for deep pressure relief.

detail.en: Settles closely around the body instead of pushing back like a springier bed.
detail.es: Se ajusta de cerca al cuerpo en vez de empujar como una cama con más rebote.

title.es: Sensación de espuma que absorbe movimiento

detail.en: Keeps partner movement quieter than coil-forward designs.
detail.es: Mantiene más silencioso el movimiento de la pareja que los diseños con resortes.

topPickReason.en: TEMPUR material molds to you for pressure relief and zero motion transfer.

gold.name: Pro Breeze 2.0 Medium Hybrid
gold.highlight: Adaptive comfort, hybrid support, all-night cooling

reasons.default: Adaptive foam comfort with hybrid bounce and all-night cooling.

title.es: Contorno TEMPUR con elevación de resortes

detail.en: Combines slow pressure relief on top with easier movement from the hybrid base.
detail.es: Combina alivio de presión lento arriba con movimiento más fácil gracias a la base híbrida.

detail.en: Built for a cooler feel than traditional deeply contouring foam.
detail.es: Diseñado para sentirse más fresco que la espuma tradicional de contorno profundo.

topPickReason.en: Sleeps cooler with TEMPUR comfort and responsive hybrid support.

gold.name: Luxe Breeze 2.0 Firm
gold.highlight: Our coolest TEMPUR, firm and supported

reasons.default: Our coolest sleep with firm, fully-supported comfort.

detail.en: A stable 7/10 surface gives less sink while retaining TEMPUR contour.
detail.es: Una superficie estable de 7/10 ofrece menos hundimiento sin perder el contorno TEMPUR.

detail.en: The cooling-focused build is the defining step up within the Breeze line.
detail.es: La construcción enfocada en frescura es el principal avance dentro de la línea Breeze.

topPickReason.en: Our coolest TEMPUR with firm, fully-supported all-night comfort.

gold.name: Lux Estate Firm
gold.highlight: Handcrafted firm coil support, built to last

reasons.default: Firm, durable coil support handcrafted for lasting comfort.

title.es: Respuesta de resortes hecha a mano

detail.en: Precision coils create a structured feel with more lift than an all-foam mattress.
detail.es: Los resortes de precisión crean una sensación estructurada con más elevación que la espuma.

detail.en: Designed to hold a stable supportive feel rather than deliver deep plush sink.
detail.es: Diseñado para conservar una sensación estable en vez de un hundimiento profundo.

topPickReason.en: Precision coils deliver firm, durable support built to last.

reasons.default: Premium coils and foams balanced for plush-yet-supported luxury.

title.es: Equilibrio de lujo suave y apoyado

detail.en: Comfort layers soften the first impression while the coil system keeps it supported.
detail.es: Las capas de confort suavizan el primer contacto mientras los resortes mantienen el apoyo.

detail.en: Premium foams and coils emphasize a substantial finished feel and long-term build.
detail.es: Espumas y resortes premium crean una sensación sustancial y una construcción duradera.

topPickReason.en: Handcrafted premium coils and foams for balanced, lasting luxury.

reasons.default: All-natural Talalay latex plushness with championship durability.

detail.en: Feels springy and immediately responsive without the slow sink of memory foam.
detail.es: Se siente elástico y responde al instante sin el hundimiento lento de la espuma viscoelástica.

detail.en: Uses resilient latex through the comfort build rather than a thin latex accent.
detail.es: Usa látex resistente en toda la estructura de confort y no solo como una capa delgada.

topPickReason.en: All-latex plush comfort with a warranty that outlasts the rest.

reasons.default: Purple's flagship GelFlex grid - cool, responsive, pressure-free.

detail.en: The grid flexes directly under pressure points while staying supportive around them.
detail.es: La rejilla cede justo bajo los puntos de presión y mantiene apoyo alrededor.

detail.en: Feels less enveloping than foam and allows easier movement across the surface.
detail.es: Envuelve menos que la espuma y permite moverse con mayor facilidad.

topPickReason.en: Purple's flagship grid for cooling, responsive, no-pressure sleep.

gold.name: Black Series Three Medium
gold.highlight: Luxury medium feel, premium coil support

reasons.default: Luxury medium comfort over premium pocketed-coil support.

detail.en: Individual coils provide defined support while limiting movement across the bed.
detail.es: Los resortes individuales dan apoyo definido y limitan el movimiento a través de la cama.

detail.en: Adds a more finished cushioned surface without losing the underlying coil response.
detail.es: Agrega una superficie más refinada sin perder la respuesta de los resortes.

topPickReason.en: Luxury medium feel over Beautyrest's premium pocketed-coil support.

reasons.default: A smart bed that adjusts each side's firmness to you.

detail.en: Each sleeper can tune their own side instead of compromising on one shared feel.
detail.es: Cada persona puede ajustar su lado sin comprometerse con una sola sensación compartida.

detail.en: Firmness can be changed after purchase as comfort preferences evolve.
detail.es: La firmeza puede cambiar después de la compra cuando evolucionen las preferencias.

topPickReason.en: Dial in each side's firmness with app-controlled smart support.

silver.name: Purple Mattress
silver.highlight: The original cooling, responsive Purple grid

reasons.default: The original Purple grid - cooling, responsive, and adaptive.

detail.en: The grid bends under pressure points and rebounds immediately as you move.
detail.es: La rejilla se dobla bajo los puntos de presión y recupera su forma al moverte.

detail.en: Delivers the distinctive floating grid feel without the thicker luxury build.
detail.es: Ofrece la sensación flotante de la rejilla sin una construcción de lujo más gruesa.

topPickReason.en: Cooling, responsive grid comfort that adapts as you move.

reasons.default: Firm grid-over-coil support with airflow and pressure relief.

detail.en: Pairs Purple's flexible surface with a stronger pushback from the hybrid base.
detail.es: Combina la superficie flexible de Purple con el empuje más fuerte de una base híbrida.

detail.en: The open grid and coil construction feels less enclosed than dense firm foam.
detail.es: La rejilla abierta y los resortes se sienten menos encerrados que una espuma firme y densa.

topPickReason.en: Firm grid-over-coil support with airflow and pressure relief.

silver.name: Snow 3.0 Hybrid
silver.highlight: Sleeps degrees cooler with zoned support

reasons.default: Sleeps cooler with zoned support tuned for hot sleepers.

detail.en: Its defining purpose is reducing heat while retaining an easy-to-move-on hybrid feel.
detail.es: Su propósito principal es reducir el calor sin perder una sensación fácil para moverse.

detail.en: Different areas are tuned to cushion pressure points and steady the middle of the body.
detail.es: Diferentes áreas amortiguan los puntos de presión y estabilizan el centro del cuerpo.

topPickReason.en: Sleeps degrees cooler with zoned support for hot sleepers.

reasons.default: Balanced hybrid comfort and cooling at an approachable price.

detail.en: Neither deeply contouring nor especially firm; it aims for an easy middle-ground feel.
detail.es: No envuelve demasiado ni se siente muy firme; busca una sensación intermedia fácil.

detail.en: Offers the movement and edge of a hybrid without stepping into a premium build.
detail.es: Ofrece el movimiento de un híbrido sin subir a una construcción premium.

topPickReason.en: Balanced hybrid comfort and cooling at an approachable price.

reasons.default: Trusted Sealy hybrid support for balanced everyday comfort.

detail.en: A straightforward medium surface over responsive support makes it easy to understand quickly.
detail.es: Una superficie media sobre apoyo sensible se entiende rápidamente al probarla.

detail.en: Prioritizes dependable alignment and movement over specialized smart or grid technology.
detail.es: Prioriza alineación y movimiento confiables sobre tecnología inteligente o de rejilla.

topPickReason.en: Trusted Sealy hybrid tuned for balanced all-night comfort.

silver.name: High Point 2 Firm
silver.highlight: Firm hybrid support, aligned all night

reasons.default: Firm hybrid support that keeps your spine aligned.

detail.en: A 7/10 surface keeps the body more on top of the mattress than nestled into it.
detail.es: Una superficie de 7/10 mantiene el cuerpo más encima del colchón que dentro de él.

detail.en: Combines firm comfort layers with coil support for a steadier response than firm foam alone.
detail.es: Combina capas firmes con resortes para una respuesta más estable que la espuma firme sola.

topPickReason.en: Firm hybrid support that keeps your spine aligned.

reasons.default: Firm pocketed-coil support with a true luxury feel.

detail.en: Delivers strong surface pushback with the familiar responsiveness of premium coils.
detail.es: Ofrece un empuje fuerte con la respuesta familiar de resortes premium.

detail.en: Individual coils move more independently than a traditional connected spring unit.
detail.es: Los resortes individuales se mueven con más independencia que una unidad tradicional conectada.

topPickReason.en: Firm Beautyrest pocketed-coil support with a luxury feel.

reasons.default: Plush, pressure-relieving comfort, handcrafted in Wisconsin.

title.es: Suavidad hecha a mano en Wisconsin

detail.en: Made locally with a distinctly soft 3/10 surface for customers who want immediate cushion.
detail.es: Fabricado localmente con una superficie muy suave de 3/10 para quien quiere acolchado inmediato.

title.es: Mayor alivio en puntos de presión

detail.en: Lets shoulders and hips settle farther than the medium and firm Astor Park options.
detail.es: Permite que hombros y caderas bajen más que en las opciones medias y firmes.

topPickReason.en: Astor Park's plush, pressure-relieving comfort - handcrafted in Wisconsin.

reasons.default: Firm, supportive comfort, handcrafted in Wisconsin.

title.es: Firmeza hecha a mano en Wisconsin

detail.en: Made locally with a stable 7/10 surface and minimal initial sink.
detail.es: Fabricado localmente con una superficie estable de 7/10 y poco hundimiento inicial.

detail.en: Emphasizes a straightforward supportive build over extra plush comfort layers.
detail.es: Destaca una construcción firme y directa sobre capas adicionales de suavidad.

topPickReason.en: Handcrafted Wisconsin firmness with dependable all-night support.

reasons.default: Cooling hybrid comfort with great motion isolation for couples.

detail.en: Combines airflow and motion control for partners who sleep warm or wake each other.
detail.es: Combina ventilación y control de movimiento para parejas que duermen con calor o se despiertan.

detail.en: Provides some contour on top while preserving the easier movement of a hybrid.
detail.es: Ofrece algo de contorno arriba y conserva el movimiento más fácil de un híbrido.

topPickReason.en: Cooling hybrid comfort and motion isolation for couples.

reasons.default: Cooling bed-in-a-box comfort that won't break the budget.

detail.en: Offers close contour and a quieter surface without the bounce of coils.
detail.es: Ofrece contorno cercano y una superficie silenciosa sin el rebote de resortes.

detail.en: Adds heat-management materials while staying in the most accessible tier.
detail.es: Agrega materiales para controlar el calor dentro del nivel más accesible.

topPickReason.en: Cooling bed-in-a-box comfort that won't break the budget.

reasons.default: Hybrid bounce and cooling at a starter-friendly price.

detail.en: Coils make turning and getting out of bed easier than on the all-foam Classic.
detail.es: Los resortes facilitan girarse y levantarse más que en el Classic de espuma.

detail.en: Pairs a cooler surface story with hybrid support in the opening tier.
detail.es: Combina una superficie más fresca con apoyo híbrido en el nivel de entrada.

topPickReason.en: Hybrid bounce and cooling at a starter-friendly price.

reasons.default: A plush-firm hybrid that feels well above its price.

detail.en: Cushioning softens the top while the 6/10 hybrid base keeps a noticeable pushback.
detail.es: El acolchado suaviza la parte superior mientras la base híbrida de 6/10 mantiene empuje.

detail.en: Aims for a heavier more finished impression than a basic starter mattress.
detail.es: Busca una impresión más sólida y terminada que un colchón inicial básico.

topPickReason.en: A plush-firm hybrid that feels far above its price.

reasons.default: Soft, budget-friendly plush comfort from a name you trust.

detail.en: A 3/10 surface gives immediate softness without premium-tier complexity.
detail.es: Una superficie de 3/10 da suavidad inmediata sin la complejidad del nivel premium.

detail.en: Uses straightforward plush cushioning for shoulders and hips at an accessible price.
detail.es: Usa acolchado suave y directo para hombros y caderas a un precio accesible.

topPickReason.en: Soft, budget-friendly plush comfort from a name you know.

reasons.default: Honest Wisconsin-made firm support at a great value.

detail.en: Locally made with a stable 7/10 feel and a straightforward support story.
detail.es: Fabricado localmente con una sensación estable de 7/10 y una propuesta de apoyo directa.

detail.en: Prioritizes dependable firmness and price over added cooling or luxury layers.
detail.es: Prioriza firmeza confiable y precio sobre capas de enfriamiento o lujo.

topPickReason.en: Wisconsin-made firm support at a guest-room-friendly price.

reasons.default: Plush euro-top comfort over dependable innerspring support.

detail.en: The sewn-on cushion creates a softer surface feel over a medium support core.
detail.es: El acolchado cosido crea una superficie más suave sobre un centro de apoyo medio.

detail.en: Feels more familiar and buoyant than a slow-contouring all-foam mattress.
detail.es: Se siente más familiar y elástico que un colchón de espuma de contorno lento.

topPickReason.en: Plush euro-top comfort over dependable innerspring support.

reasons.default: Extra foam and support stepped up from the entry hybrid.

detail.en: Adds more cushioning and support than the opening DreamCloud hybrid.
detail.es: Agrega más acolchado y apoyo que el híbrido DreamCloud de entrada.

detail.en: Keeps a medium feel with coil lift for customers who do not want deep sink or firm pushback.
detail.es: Mantiene una sensación media con elevación de resortes sin hundimiento profundo ni empuje firme.

topPickReason.en: More foam and support than the entry hybrid, for a little more.
